response.objective_caption: A forested hillside covered in fog, with layered evergreen trees visible in the foreground and middle ground. Distant trees fade into the mist toward the top of the frame. A watermark reading "© PennyClick.dpchallenge.com" is present in the lower right corner.

Layered evergreen trees in the foreground and middle ground recede into heavy mist where distant conifers dissolve into ambiguity.
